title: 熱流体工学Ⅰ 前期中間 改変版
subtitle: 数値・条件を変えた練習問題 全13問 ｜ ⚠️ 答えは有効数字3桁で入力
subject: 熱流体工学Ⅰ

problems.q: 体積 $V = 2.5\ \mathrm{m^3}$ の液体の重さを測定したところ $W = 22\ \mathrm{kN}$ であった。この液体の質量 $m$、密度 $\rho$、比重 $s$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 260 130" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="60" y="20" width="140" height="85" rx="4" fill="rgba(86,207,178,.15)" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2"/>
<line x1="60" y1="20" x2="200" y2="20" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="130" y="66" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="13" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">液体</text>
<text x="130" y="84" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">V = 2.5 m³</text>
<line x1="50" y1="105" x2="210" y2="105" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<line x1="100" y1="105" x2="100" y2="118" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="2"/>
<line x1="160" y1="105" x2="160" y2="118" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="2"/>
<line x1="100" y1="113" x2="160" y2="113" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="2"/>
<text x="130" y="128" fill="#f87171" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">W = 22 kN</text>
</svg>

problems.q: 動粘度 $\nu = 1.50\times10^{-4}\ \mathrm{m^2/s}$、比重 $s = 0.870$ の液体の粘性係数 $\mu$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 260 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="15" width="220" height="70" rx="3" fill="rgba(86,207,178,.10)" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<text x="130" y="52" fill="#e8eaf6" font-size="12" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">液体（s=0.870）</text>
<text x="130" y="70" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">ν = 1.50×10⁻⁴ m²/s  →  μ = ?</text>
</svg>

problems.q: 圧力 $650\ \mathrm{mmHg}$ を $\mathrm{kPa}$ に換算せよ。（$\rho_{Hg} = 13.6\times10^3\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$）
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 200 160" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="80" y="20" width="30" height="120" rx="4" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="2"/>
<rect x="82" y="22" width="26" height="118" rx="3" fill="rgba(200,200,200,.15)"/>
<rect x="82" y="72" width="26" height="68" rx="2" fill="rgba(180,180,200,.7)"/>
<text x="118" y="30" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">真空</text>
<line x1="108" y1="72" x2="138" y2="72" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.2"/>
<line x1="108" y1="140" x2="138" y2="140" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.2"/>
<line x1="133" y1="72" x2="133" y2="140" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.2"/>
<text x="140" y="110" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif">650 mm</text>
<text x="60" y="155" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水銀</text>
</svg>

problems.q: 底面積 $A = 0.04\ \mathrm{m^2}$、質量 $m = 25\ \mathrm{kg}$ の金属板が傾斜角 $\theta = 45°$ の斜面上の油膜（$\mu = 0.03\ \mathrm{Pa{\cdot}s}$、$\delta = 0.02\ \mathrm{mm}$）の上を滑り落ちる。最大速度 $U_{\max}$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 280 160" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<line x1="20" y1="140" x2="240" y2="40" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<line x1="18" y1="145" x2="242" y2="45" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="5" stroke-opacity=".3"/>
<rect x="95" y="70" width="70" height="40" rx="3" transform="rotate(-22,130,90)" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<text x="130" y="87" fill="#e8eaf6" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle" transform="rotate(-22,130,90)">金属板</text>
<text x="130" y="99" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle" transform="rotate(-22,130,90)">A=0.04m²</text>
<text x="30" y="138" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">θ=45°</text>
<line x1="165" y1="88" x2="183" y2="78" stroke="#f87171" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<polygon points="179,74 187,80 181,85" fill="#f87171"/>
<text x="187" y="77" fill="#f87171" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">U=?</text>
<text x="14" y="46" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">δ=0.02mm, μ=0.03 Pa·s</text>
</svg>

problems.q: 一辺 $a$ の正方形ゲートが水面と $60°$ の傾斜面にある。ゲート重心の水深 $h = 1.5\ \mathrm{m}$ のとき $F = 8\ \mathrm{kN}$ が作用した。$a$ と作用点 $y_c$ を求めよ。（$F = \rho g h A$、$y_c = I_G/(y_G A) + y_G$、$I_G = a^4/12$）
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 280 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="20" width="160" height="170" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.12)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="20" y1="20" x2="180" y2="20" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="100" y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<line x1="180" y1="20" x2="260" y2="190" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="3"/>
<rect x="182" y="65" width="14" height="70" rx="2" transform="rotate(23,189,100)" fill="#56cfb2" stroke="#7c6af7" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<text x="222" y="108" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">a×a</text>
<line x1="182" y1="20" x2="195" y2="20" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="207" y1="90" x2="217" y2="90" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="193" y1="20" x2="215" y2="90" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="222" y="60" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">h=1.5m</text>
<text x="186" y="188" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">θ=60°</text>
<line x1="188" y1="70" x2="172" y2="75" stroke="#f87171" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<polygon points="168,71 175,78 165,82" fill="#f87171"/>
<text x="148" y="68" fill="#f87171" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">F=8kN</text>
</svg>

problems.q:
AB は半径 $r = 0.5\ \mathrm{m}$ の円弧面（1/4円弧）で、A までの水深 $h = 1.2\ \mathrm{m}$、タンクの幅 $b = 1.5\ \mathrm{m}$。
(1) 鉛直方向成分 $F_v$　(2) 水平方向成分 $F_h$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 260 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="15" width="175" height="195" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.12)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.2"/>
<line x1="20" y1="15" x2="195" y2="15" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="108" y="10" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<path d="M 195,70 A 125,125 0 0,1 70,195" fill="rgba(30,34,53,.9)" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="198" y="69" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">A</text>
<text x="58" y="208" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">B</text>
<line x1="197" y1="15" x2="210" y2="15" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="197" y1="70" x2="210" y2="70" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="206" y1="15" x2="206" y2="70" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="213" y="46" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">h=1.2m</text>
<line x1="197" y1="70" x2="210" y2="70" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="197" y1="195" x2="210" y2="195" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="205" y1="70" x2="205" y2="195" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="213" y="136" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">r=0.5m</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
$F_v = \rho g (h r + \pi r^2/4) b$
$F_h = \rho g (h + r/2) r b$

problems.q: $y_1 = 0.8\ \mathrm{m}$、$y_2 = 0.6\ \mathrm{m}$、$\rho = 1000\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$、$\rho' = 13.6\times10^3\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$ のとき、$\Delta P = P_1 - P_2$ を求めよ。

<text x="255" y="54" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">P₁</text>
<path d="M 45,80 L 45,165 Q 45,175 55,175 L 245,175 Q 255,175 255,165 L 255,80" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="2"/>
<path d="M 55,80 L 55,165 Q 55,170 60,170 L 240,170 Q 245,170 245,165 L 245,80" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="2"/>
<rect x="55" y="120" width="190" height="50" fill="rgba(180,160,180,.6)"/>
<text x="150" y="149" fill="#e8eaf6" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水銀（ρ'=13.6×10³）</text>
<rect x="45" y="80" width="10" height="40" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.3)"/>
<rect x="245" y="80" width="10" height="40" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.3)"/>
<line x1="36" y1="80" x2="44" y2="80" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="36" y1="120" x2="44" y2="120" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="40" y1="80" x2="40" y2="120" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="14" y="103" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">y₁</text>
<text x="12" y="111" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">0.8m</text>
<line x1="256" y1="80" x2="264" y2="80" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="256" y1="120" x2="264" y2="120" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="260" y1="80" x2="260" y2="120" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="266" y="103" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">y₂</text>
<text x="264" y="111" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">0.6m</text>
</svg>

problems.q: $y_1 = 0.25\ \mathrm{m}$、$y_2 = 0.35\ \mathrm{m}$、$\rho = 830\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$、$\rho' = 910\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$ のとき、$\Delta P = P_2 - P_1$ を求めよ。

</svg>

problems.q: 海水に突き出た部分 $450\ \mathrm{m^3}$ の氷山の全体積 $V$ を求めよ。$\rho_{ice} = 917\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$、$\rho_{sea} = 1025\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 260 180" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="80" width="220" height="90" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.18)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<line x1="20" y1="80" x2="240" y2="80" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="130" y="74" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">海面（ρ=1025）</text>
<polygon points="80,20 180,20 200,80 60,80" fill="rgba(200,230,255,.7)" stroke="#e8eaf6" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="90,80 170,80 190,130 70,130" fill="rgba(180,210,240,.5)" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
<text x="130" y="52" fill="#1e2235" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">氷山</text>
<text x="130" y="112" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">ρ_ice=917 kg/m³</text>
<line x1="202" y1="20" x2="216" y2="20" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="202" y1="80" x2="216" y2="80" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="210" y1="20" x2="210" y2="80" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="218" y="54" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">450m³</text>
</svg>

problems.tag: 連続の式・ベルヌーイ（空気）
problems.q:
$\rho = 1.2\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$、$d_1 = 80\ \mathrm{mm}$、$d_2 = 30\ \mathrm{mm}$、断面②の流速 $v_2 = 20\ \mathrm{m/s}$。
(1) 断面①の流速 $v_1$　(2) 圧力差 $\Delta P = P_1 - P_2$
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 280 130" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M20,20 L115,20 L165,42 L250,42 L250,88 L165,88 L115,110 L20,110 Z" fill="rgba(86,207,178,.09)" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<line x1="38" y1="65" x2="62" y2="65" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="60,61 60,69 68,65" fill="#56cfb2"/>
<text x="24" y="60" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">v₁?</text>
<text x="20" y="118" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">① d₁=80mm</text>
<line x1="196" y1="65" x2="220" y2="65" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="218,61 218,69 226,65" fill="#56cfb2"/>
<text x="185" y="60" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">v₂=20m/s</text>
<text x="188" y="80" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">② d₂=30mm</text>
<text x="130" y="14" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">ρ=1.2 kg/m³（空気）</text>
</svg>

<polygon points="37,37 45,37 41,28" fill="#f87171"/>

</svg>

problems.q:
断面①: $P_1 = -5.00\ \mathrm{kPa}$（ゲージ）、$u_1 = 8\ \mathrm{m/s}$。断面②: 出口（大気圧）。管径一定（$d = 12\ \mathrm{cm}$）。
(1) $H_1$（①と②の高さ差）　(2) $H_2$（水面③と①の高さ差）　(3) $u_2$　(4) $H_3$（水面③と②の高さ差）
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 240 240" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="10" width="130" height="80" fill="rgba(86,207,178,.12)" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
<line x1="20" y1="10" x2="150" y2="10" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="85" y="5" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面③</text>
<rect x="75" y="90" width="20" height="60" fill="rgba(86,207,178,.18)" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<circle cx="85" cy="90" r="4" fill="#a5b4fc"/>
<text x="97" y="89" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">① P₁=-5kPa,u₁=8m/s</text>
<line x1="155" y1="90" x2="170" y2="90" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="155" y1="10" x2="170" y2="10" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="165" y1="10" x2="165" y2="90" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="172" y="53" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">H₂</text>
<rect x="75" y="150" width="20" height="60" fill="rgba(86,207,178,.18)" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<circle cx="85" cy="150" r="4" fill="#56cfb2"/>
<text x="97" y="149" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">② 出口（大気圧）</text>
<line x1="97" y1="90" x2="115" y2="90" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="97" y1="150" x2="115" y2="150" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="111" y1="90" x2="111" y2="150" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="118" y="123" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">H₁</text>

problems.q: 目盛管の直径 $d = 4\ \mathrm{mm}$、質量 $m = 3.5\ \mathrm{g}$ の比重計。密度 $\rho_1 = 780\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$ のエタノールに浮かべ、別の液体に浮かべると目盛管が $h = 30\ \mathrm{mm}$ だけ深く沈んだ。その液体の密度 $\rho_2$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="60" y="60" width="80" height="130" rx="4" fill="rgba(86,207,178,.10)" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<line x1="60" y1="60" x2="140" y2="60" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="100" y="54" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">液面</text>
<ellipse cx="100" cy="155" rx="20" ry="28" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2"/>
<rect x="94" y="60" width="12" height="95" rx="3" fill="#2d3154" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<text x="100" y="156" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">錘</text>
<line x1="142" y1="60" x2="158" y2="60" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="142" y1="90" x2="158" y2="90" stroke="#f87171" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
<line x1="152" y1="60" x2="152" y2="90" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="160" y="78" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">h=30mm</text>
<text x="100" y="126" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">m=3.5g, d=4mm</text>
<text x="100" y="188" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">ρ₁=780 kg/m³（エタノール）</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
$m/\rho_2 = m/\rho_1 + A_{stem} h$
$A_{stem} = \pi d^2/4$
$\rho_2 = m/(m/\rho_1 + A_{stem} h)$
